jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Unacademy - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Unacademy in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy:
Unacademy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy!
